title: RawToLeadsMapping
description: Machine-readable field mapping from _raw_import.raw_payload_json and row metadata to LEADS columns. Consumed by the normalizer (A-03 implementation).

source_payload_shape.note: Canonical keys produced by scraper (A-04). Scraper is responsible for portal-specific parsing; normalizer consumes uniform shape.

legacy_hardcoded.note: Positions fixed in Config.gs:44 LEGACY_COL, protected by validateLegacyColHeaders_() in Helpers.gs:277

header_resolver.note: Accessed by name via buildHeaderResolver() in Helpers.gs:56

extension_append_only.note: New columns appended to EXTENSION_COLUMNS in Config.gs:63

field_mapping.transform: String(v).trim(); collapse whitespace; preserve case + diacritics + suffixes; max 200 chars
field_mapping.missing: REJECT with MISSING_BUSINESS_NAME if < 2 chars after trim

field_mapping.transform: String(v).replace(/\D/g,''); valid iff exactly 8 digits; no checksum validation
field_mapping.missing: keep null

field_mapping.transform: String(v).trim(); collapse whitespace; fake standalone tokens (info, sales, office, hello, kontakt, admin, webmaster) -> null
field_mapping.missing: keep null

field_mapping.transform: normalizePhone_() then CZ prefix rules: +420 for 9 digits, 00420 -> +420, 0xxxxxxxxx -> +420, 420xxxxxxxxx -> +420xxxxxxxxx; require >=9 digits after normalization
field_mapping.missing: empty string "" (not null) if invalid; at least one of phone/email must be non-empty
empty string "" (not null) if invalid; at least one of phone/email must be non-empty
empty string "" if invalid or empty
never null or empty — always 'yes' or 'no'

field_mapping.transform: String(v).trim(); preserve case + diacritics (required for CITY_LOCATIVES_ in Helpers.gs:498)
field_mapping.missing: REJECT with MISSING_CITY if empty after trim

field_mapping.transform: String(v).trim(); preserve diacritics; if district == city then null (redundant)
field_mapping.missing: keep null
keep null

field_mapping.transform: removeDiacritics_(trimLower_()); replace non [a-z0-9] with -, collapse, strip edge dashes; must match ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*[a-z0-9]$
field_mapping.missing: keep null (and if < 2 chars after cleaning)

field_mapping.transform: String(v).trim(); collapse whitespace; NO lowercasing, NO diacritics stripping — human-readable raw text
field_mapping.missing: keep null
keep null

field_mapping.transform: String(v).replace(',','.').trim(); Number(); valid iff finite AND in [0, 5]
field_mapping.missing: keep null; NO clamp — out-of-range yields null
keep null; empty string, null, NaN, negative all yield null
always present (required from A-01)
always present
always present
always present
always present
always generated at LEADS insert moment

field_mapping.transform: generateLeadId_() — ASW-{ts36}-{rnd4}, shared helper in Helpers.gs; refactored from PreviewPipeline.gs:63-108 ensureLeadIds()
field_mapping.missing: always generated at LEADS insert moment
always set; downstream qualifyLeads() changes it later

rejected_error.condition: raw_payload_json cannot be parsed as JSON
business_name is empty or < 2 chars after trim
both phone and email are empty string after cleaning
Sheets API error at LEADS append

check_order: 4. Clean phone and email (both empty -> NO_CONTACT_CHANNELS)
9. Assemble LEADS row payload and hand off to import writer

empty_string_not_null.reason: Consistent with isBlank_() guard in Helpers.gs:336, Google Sheets never stores null (round-trip yields ''), and project helpers like normalizePhone_() and extractDomainFromUrl_() return '' not null for invalid input

always_filled.reason: Computed or copied from _raw_import; never null, never empty

keep_null.reason: Optional fields with no meaningful empty-string representation
